analysis_report.title: Summary
analysis_report.content: Based on LSTM neural network analysis of AMZN's recent market data, the model predicts an upward price movement for the next trading day with low confidence (52%). This prediction is derived from a combination of technical indicators, price momentum, trading volume patterns, and news sentiment analysis.

analysis_report.title: Price Action & Trend
analysis_report.content: AMZN has shown a slight downward trend recently, with an average daily return of -0.33%. Over the last 20 trading sessions, the stock moved from $273.55 to $256.52 (-6.23%). The technical score of 47% suggests a neutral technical outlook.

analysis_report.title: Volume Analysis
analysis_report.content: Trading volume is near the average level (ratio: 1.06x), suggesting normal market participation. This indicates steady interest without extreme buying or selling pressure.

analysis_report.title: News Sentiment
analysis_report.content: News sentiment analysis shows a neutral score of 50%. Recent news coverage about AMZN is mixed, with balanced positive and negative reports. A neutral sentiment suggests the market is undecided about future direction.

analysis_report.title: Key Drivers
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model identified the most influential factors for this prediction as: Moving Average Ratio (12%), RSI Indicator (11%), Price Range (11%). Moving Average Ratio is the most significant factor in the model's decision-making process.

analysis_report.title: Model Confidence
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model achieved 60% accuracy and 75% F1-score on the test dataset. These metrics suggest reasonable predictive performance, though past performance does not guarantee future accuracy. This model is designed for educational and research purposes only and should not be used as the sole basis for investment decisions.
